fields.helpText: This field contains the date of the MST status change.  Time is required, and future dates are not allowed.
This field contains a pointer back to the PATIENT File (#2)

fields.setOfCodes: Y:Yes, Screened reports MST;N:No, Screened does not report MST;D:Screened Declines to answer;U:Unknown, not screened;
fields.helpText: Indicates whether the patient has been screened, and whether the patient claims Military Sexual Trauma.
Pointer to the provider who determined the MST status of the patient
Name of the user who entered this change in status for the patient

This field contains a pointer to the INSTITUTION file (#4) indicating the site associated with the MST Status determination.  If the MST Status is entered by a local VistA site, then the API DGMSTAPI will load this field with the current Primary station number.  If the MST Status is entered by Enrollment/Eligibility Data upload from the HEC, then the site stored with the record at the HEC will be loaded.
